name: cribl_expert
description: Cribl pipeline expertise skill for designing pipelines, optimizing performance, generating routes, and estimating data volume reduction.
author: ObsAI Team

cribl_version.description: Cribl Stream version for compatibility checks

default_worker_count.description: Default number of Cribl worker processes

actions.name: design_pipeline
actions.description: Design a Cribl Stream pipeline from a requirements description including function selection and ordering.

requirements.description: Description of pipeline requirements (e.g., 'filter out debug logs, mask SSN fields, route to S3')

actions.name: optimize_pipeline
actions.description: Optimize an existing Cribl pipeline for performance and cost by analyzing function order and suggesting improvements.

pipeline.description: JSON string or description of the existing pipeline functions

actions.name: generate_route
actions.description: Generate Cribl route configuration with filters based on routing requirements.

description.description: Description of routing requirements (e.g., 'route syslog to Splunk, metrics to S3')

actions.name: estimate_reduction
actions.description: Estimate data volume reduction from pipeline transformations based on the types of functions applied.

daily_volume_gb.description: Current daily data volume in GB

transforms.description: Comma-separated list of transforms to apply (e.g., 'filter_debug,mask_pii,remove_fields,suppress_duplicates')
